narrative:
Precinct Union Township A (precinct in Scioto County) has 740 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
